qualify_lead.name: Lead Qualification
qualify_lead.description: Qualify a potential customer by gathering key information about their application, budget, and timeline

step_descriptions.ask_application: Understand the specific application and use case
step_descriptions.ask_timeline: Understand when they need the machine operational

prompts.ask_application: What specific application will you be using the machine for? For example, automotive parts, packaging, signage, or something else?
prompts.ask_budget: To help me recommend the right machine, could you share a bit about your budget for this project?
prompts.ask_timeline: What is your expected timeline? When do you need the machine to be operational?
prompts.ask_volume: What production volume are you targeting? Are you looking at prototyping, small batches, or mass production?

book_meeting.name: Meeting Booking
book_meeting.description: Schedule a meeting, call, or demo with the prospect

step_descriptions.propose_meeting: Propose scheduling a meeting or call
step_descriptions.get_contact: Get contact details for the meeting invite

prompts.propose_meeting: Would you be available for a quick call this week to discuss your requirements in more detail? It would help me understand your needs better.
prompts.confirm_time: What times work best for you? I'm flexible with my schedule.
prompts.get_contact: Could you share your preferred contact number or email so I can send you the meeting invite?

prepare_quote.name: Quote Preparation
prepare_quote.description: Gather information needed to prepare a detailed quotation

step_descriptions.identify_model: Identify the machine model they need
step_descriptions.ask_options: Ask about optional features and accessories
step_descriptions.get_shipping_location: Get shipping destination for delivery estimates

prompts.identify_model: Which machine model are you interested in? For example, PF1-C series, PF1-X series, or would you like me to recommend one based on your forming size?
prompts.confirm_specs: Could you confirm the forming area size you need? For example, 1500x2000mm or 2000x3000mm?
prompts.ask_options: Would you like any additional options like automatic sheet loading, plug assist, or temperature monitoring?
prompts.get_shipping_location: Where will the machine be installed? This helps me include accurate shipping costs in the quote.

technical_consultation.name: Technical Consultation
technical_consultation.description: Provide technical guidance and understand detailed requirements

step_descriptions.understand_part_geometry: Understand part geometry and draw depth

prompts.understand_material: What material will you be thermoforming? This affects the heater selection and process parameters.
prompts.understand_part_geometry: What is the draw depth of your parts? And are there any complex geometries or undercuts?
prompts.assess_heating_needs: Do you have specific heating requirements? For example, single-sided vs twin-sheet, or zone-controlled heating?

follow_up_nurture.name: Lead Nurturing Follow-up
follow_up_nurture.description: Re-engage with a lead who hasn't responded or needs nurturing

prompts.check_status: I wanted to follow up on our previous conversation. How is your project progressing?
prompts.offer_help: Is there any additional information I can provide to help you move forward?
prompts.suggest_next_step: Would it help to schedule a quick call to discuss any remaining questions?
